title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at Aptech

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at Aptech
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Aptech. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Software Engineer to strengthen our Chennai-based team.

About Aptech:
Aptech is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in TensorFlow

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Aptech!
